{
  "claims": [
    "Some demonstrators at UCLA are engaging in dangerous, discriminatory practices that likely violate Title VI's mandate to protect students from discriminatory harassment.",
    "Video footage and first-hand accounts indicate that demonstrators at UCLA are maintaining checkpoints throughout campus with signs such as 'Zionists not welcome.'",
    "Demonstrators at UCLA have physically intimidated students by blocking their movements and pursuing them aggressively.",
    "Evidence shows that Jewish and Israeli-American students may be denied access to university facilities based on their perceived national origin or ethnicity.",
    "UCLA has not taken sufficient action to protect students' rights under Title VI despite awareness of the incidents.",
    "Increased security presence at UCLA has not improved the alarming reality for Jewish and Israeli-American students.",
    "UCLA's administration has acknowledged the incidents of discrimination occurring on campus."
  ]
}
